title: Piccolo
short description: Piccolo was a MFSK system developed by the UK Foreign and Commonwealth Office (FCO) to communicate with foreign embassies and UK military stations around the world. No longer used.
description:
**Piccolo** was a MFSK system developed by the UK Foreign and Commonwealth Office (FCO) to communicate with foreign embassies and UK military stations around the world. No longer used.

Two Types:

* MK6: 180 Hz wide 6-tone MFSK version of Piccolo. Uses [ITA-2](http://www.wavecom.ch/content/ext/decoder-online-help/default.htm#!worddocuments/ita2alphabet.htm) encoding for alphanumeric text.

* MK12: 300 Hz wide 12-tone MFSK version of Piccolo. Uses [ITA-5](http://www.wavecom.ch/content/ext/decoder-online-help/default.htm#!worddocuments/ita5alphabet.htm) encoding for alphanumeric text.
